---
bibliography: ../references.bib
---

# Executive Summary {.unnumbered}

This report is a `r report_status` for the `r assessment_name` in the
`r assessment_area`. It summarises the data, model configuration, diagnostics,
uncertainty treatment, and management quantities for the `r assessment_year`
assessment of `r species_label` (*`r species_scientific`*).

The assessment uses an integrated MULTIFAN-CL modelling framework with fishery
catch, effort, size-composition, tagging, biological, and abundance-index data.
Report-ready figures and tables are inserted automatically from the selected
workflow outputs. Text marked as TODO identifies the interpretation or final
assessment values that must be completed after the accepted model set has been
reviewed.

No stock-status values in this draft should be read as final advice until the
diagnostic model, structural uncertainty set, and estimation-uncertainty
workflow are confirmed.

## Main Updates for `r assessment_year`

> **TODO:** Summarise only changes confirmed for the `r assessment_year`
> assessment, including the final data years, input-preparation changes, CPUE
> standardisation changes, tagging changes, biological assumptions, MFCL or
> mfclrtmb changes, and convergence or uncertainty treatment.

## Stock Status Summary

> **TODO:** Insert final recent depletion, fishing mortality, uncertainty
> ranges, limit-reference-point status, and harvest-strategy objective status
> only after the management-advice model set is finalised.

## Key Diagnostics and Uncertainty

> **TODO:** Summarise convergence, Hessian and jitter outcomes, major
> sensitivities, and the axes that remain in the structural uncertainty grid.

## Main Conclusions

> **TODO:** Replace this list with final assessment conclusions. Do not reuse
> earlier stock-status conclusions unless each conclusion is supported by the
> accepted `r assessment_year` assessment results.
